testcase.name: test_quick_booking_missing_guest_name

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for empty guest name, got 200 assert 200 in [400, 422] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quick_booking.py:103: in test_quick_booking_missing_guest_name assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422 for empty guest name, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for empty guest name, got 200 E assert 200 in [400, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_quick_booking_checkout_before_checkin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for invalid dates, got 200 assert 200 in [400, 422] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quick_booking.py:152: in test_quick_booking_checkout_before_checkin assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422 for invalid dates, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for invalid dates, got 200 E assert 200 in [400, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_quick_booking_creates_guest_and_booking
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quick_booking.py:278: in test_quick_booking_creates_guest_and_booking assert guests_response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
